title: Koeleria paradoxa

intro: Koeleria paradoxa, also known as the Paradox Koeleria or Snowy June-grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for relieving stress, improving sleep, and supporting immune function. The bioactive constituents of Koeleria paradoxa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. In traditional medicine, Koeleria paradoxa is commonly used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety, and improve overall well-being.
